16.anchor: for by them he lives in luxury,

9.note: The meaning of the Hebrew line is uncertain

13.anchor: laying him bare from thigh to neck.
13.note: The meaning of the Hebrew line is uncertain

4.anchor: the righteous shall live by his faith.

5.note: Masoretic Text; Dead Sea Scroll wealth

5.anchor: an arrogant man who is never at rest.
5.note: The meaning of the Hebrew of these two lines is uncertain
